title: (WIP) Better Resources
description:
A mod adding more resources to Minecraft


You can contact me on discord: im_catdev
body:
What does that mod add:


Steel:
- Steel ingots that are crafted with one coal and one iron ingot
- Steel blocks that are crafted like every other block
- Steel pipe - a very powerful weapon that can blind your enemies for 3 seconds, you can craft it from 3 steel pipe parts
- Steel armor is crafted like usual
- Steel tools



All unusual crafting recipes will be available soon in the gallery
